4 Premium Enclaves

Garden Ganj is divided into four distinctly planned enclaves, each with dedicated roads, parks, and plot sizes to suit every budget.

Ganga Enclave

Premium plots, wider roads, park-facing options

Yamuna Enclave

Mid-size plots with excellent connectivity

Saraswati Enclave

Value-priced plots near commercial zone

Brahma Enclave

Corner & resort-facing plots — limited availability

📍 Neighbourhood & Connectivity

🛣️ Sultanpur Road 900m
🚂 Rehmatnagar Railway Station 1 km
🏙️ Gosaiganj 8 km
🚗 Purvanchal Expressway 2 km
🛤️ Kisan Path 12 km
🏘️ Mohammed Pur, Garhi Adjacent
Lifestyle Amenities

Garden Ganj Resort — Where Nature Meets Luxury

Residents of Garden Ganj enjoy an exclusive on-site resort offering premium wellness and recreation facilities — a rare feature at this price point.

Nestled within the lush greenery of Garden Ganj, the on-site resort is a private sanctuary for residents — offering tranquility, rejuvenation, and family recreation without leaving the township.

Our Services

🏘️

Residential Plots

🏡

Row Houses

🏰

Villas

Exclusive villas with premium finishes — for those who want more space, more privacy, and more prestige.

🌿

Farm Houses

Tranquil farm house plots on the city periphery — ideal for weekend getaways or long-term investment.

🏗️

Construction

Full turnkey construction from foundation to furnishing — quality builds, on time, on budget.

📈

Investment Advisory

Expert guidance on where and when to invest in Lucknow's fastest-appreciating real estate zones.

Why Choose Us

The Xlent Builder Difference

We're not just selling property — we're helping families make one of the most important decisions of their lives. That responsibility is at the core of everything we do.

01

Transparent Transactions

No hidden charges, no last-minute surprises. Every cost is disclosed upfront so you can decide with clarity.

02

Bank-Approved Properties

All our projects are pre-approved by leading nationalized banks, making home loan processing fast and hassle-free.

03

Lucknow-Born, Lucknow-Led

Led by MD. Bilal Khan, our team knows every neighborhood and every growth corridor in this city intimately.

04

After-Sales Support

Our relationship doesn't end at possession — we assist with construction, interiors, and resale when the time comes.

Our Market

Lucknow's Fastest-Growing Property Corridor

Sultanpur Road and the Purvanchal Expressway belt is Lucknow's hottest real estate destination. Infrastructure is expanding rapidly — early investors are already seeing significant appreciation.

Garden Ganj sits at the intersection of Sultanpur Highway and the upcoming Purvanchal growth belt — 2 km from the Expressway and 900 m from the Sultanpur Road mainline. With Rehmatnagar Railway Station just 1 km away, this location is primed for strong capital growth.
